description: Create three recurring holidays and a new Holiday Policy in TimeTrex, linking them together. The holidays to be created are: "New Year's Day" (Type: Fixed, Month: January, Day: 1), "Independence Day" (Type: Fixed, Month: July, Day: 4), and "Christmas Day" (Type: Fixed, Month: December, Day: 25). Create a new Holiday Policy named "2026 Standard Holidays" (Type: Standard) and associate all three recurring holidays with this policy. Login credentials: Username: demoadmin1, Password: demo
